name: PAY_GENERIC_ANA_DATA
description: This table contains pay generic analytics transaction data.

columns.Name: PAY_GEN_ANA_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: System-generated primary key column. Payroll Generic Analytics Data Id.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Id, identify partent Payroll Generic Analytics Data Id.

columns.Name: BASE_GEN_ANA_TYPE
columns.Comments: Base Generic Analytics Type, Identify payroll, prepayment, payment, payslip and costing.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll Action Id, Foreign key to pay_payroll_actions table.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Legislative Data Group Id. Foreign key to PER_LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUPS_vl table.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation Code. Identify legislation code.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll Id, Foreign key to PAY_ALL_PAYROLLS_F table.

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Action Type, Identify payroll run, prepayment, payment..

columns.Name: FLOW_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Flow Instance Id, Foreign key to pay_flow_instances table.

columns.Name: BASE_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Base Flow Id. Foreign key to pay_flows table.

columns.Name: PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: Period Id, Foreign key to HR person table.

columns.Name: PERIOD_START_DATE
columns.Comments: PERIOD_START_DATE. Period Start Date in pay_period table

columns.Name: PERIOD_END_DATE
columns.Comments: PERIOD_END_DATE. Period End Date in pay_period table

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: EFFECTIVE_DATE, Effective Date in pay_payroll_actions table

columns.Name: CONSOLIDATION_SET_ID
columns.Comments: CONSOLIDATION_SET_ID, Consolidation Set Id in pay_payroll_actions table

columns.Name: RUN_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: RUN_TYPE_ID, Run Type Id in pay_payroll_actions table

columns.Name: PARENT_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Parent Payroll Action Id, identify parent payroll_action_id

columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only, Flex field used by payroll generic analytics.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.
